projects.title: Wheele
projects.subtitle: Peer-to-Peer (P2P) Car Rental Platform
projects.description: Designed and developed a full-stack collaborative economy platform connecting vehicle owners with renters, overseeing the entire lifecycle from database architecture to mobile UI implementation.

projects.description: Led end-to-end development of a ClassPass-style SaaS platform connecting users with multiple fitness centers, enabling gym operators to manage operations while delivering a seamless real-time booking experience.

projects.title: MAG

projects.title: Blue Royale Spa

projects.title: Mouse
projects.subtitle: E-commerce Platform for Electronics
projects.description: Delivered an e-commerce platform for electronics with product catalog, cart and checkout flows, inventory administration, and order management for daily operations.

experience.role: Senior Software Engineer - Generative AI & Enterprise Search
experience.description: Designed and implemented high-performance data ingestion pipelines with Aspire 5, automating crawling, extraction, and cleansing across heterogeneous sources. Developed Groovy scripts for real-time transformation and normalization, leveraged Elasticsearch for enterprise-scale retrieval, and delivered Power BI dashboards for actionable KPI insights.

Designed microservices architecture for high-traffic applications to improve scalability and reduce downtime. Reduced production vulnerabilities through a security-first approach with Checkmarx integration, architected scalable GCP cloud functions in Python, and maintained event-driven components (Pub/Sub) with CI/CD in Bitbucket Pipelines.

Led migration of 4+ monolithic applications to Spring Cloud microservices, improving deployment efficiency by 30%. Streamlined CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins for faster, more reliable releases, and integrated AWS services to improve scalability while reducing infrastructure costs.

Built OSGi service components for Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) to improve content delivery. Delivered features aligned with coding standards, unit testing, and CI best practices, collaborated closely with product owners in agile sprints, and designed GraphQL endpoints for flexible data retrieval.

Built full-stack web applications and RESTful APIs, and optimized complex SQL queries and stored procedures in Oracle/PostgreSQL to improve reporting performance. Integrated third-party services into client solutions and collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver within scope and deadlines.
